scripts.doctor: node -e "console.log('node',process.version); console.log('npm',process.env.npm_config_user_agent||'');" && npm -w ts-backend run -s typecheck --if-present && npm -w react-assistant-ui run -s predev --if-present
scripts.dev: concurrently -n backend,ui,extension -c blue,magenta,green "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:ui" "npm run dev:extension"
scripts.build: npm run --if-present --workspace ts-backend --workspace react-assistant-ui --workspace vscode-Astro-extension build
scripts.typecheck: npm run --if-present --workspace ts-backend --workspace react-assistant-ui --workspace vscode-Astro-extension typecheck
scripts.watch: npm run --if-present --parallel --workspace ts-backend --workspace react-assistant-ui --workspace vscode-Astro-extension watch
